content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed in our college is 5%. The highest salary package offered is 30 LPA. From our class, a few people got jobs but only less than 5 people are doing jobs because of 3 years of contract. Marketing and analytics sector roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Mainly people joined the college by seeing the infrastructure. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements and faculty are excellent.

content.Placements: The placement scenario is good at our college. Pre-placement training is provided for success. Some students are opting for higher studies, while others, if eligible, are securing jobs. Companies like Tech Mahindra, Amazon, DXC, and HDFC recruit from our campus.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is equipped with good infrastructure and provides many facilities and amenities, such as labs, classrooms, transportation, canteens, and medical facilities. Regarding hostel facilities, the food in the mess is healthy and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Experienced faculty, many opportunities in internships, good infrastructure, & overall development.

content.Placements: I can't exactly give you the percentage but our college focuses on every student and gives equal opportunities to all. So we usually keep getting internship opportunities. And we were told we'd be given placements after the 3rd or during the 3rd year. For internships, there are companies like insplore, Coca-Cola, etc. In my first year, I got an internship at Hindustan Coca-Cola Beverages Pvt. Ltd., and in my second year, I'm selected for an internship at an abroad focus.
content.Infrastructure: The phones are not allowed. We have a lab, library, canteen, Wi-Fi, auditorium, projectors in classes and AC in every class. The food in the canteen is great. And weekly sports and club activities are conducted. The college doesn't have its own hostel but when I enrolled, many hostels were recommended by our director, sir, who is very kind and supports the students if they want to do something new.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Fortune School of Business, Kukatpally.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students get placed in our college according to seniors. The minimum package is 4 LPA. Many companies come here to hire interns, and at least 55% of students get internships here. Companies like TCS and many more come to our college for interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my course is very good. The lab is available for practicals, and the classroom is also good. We also have a library. There is no hostel of the college. If you are from another state, you need to stay in a PG or flat. There are many PGs around here, and they are near the college.
